question_text: What is your favorite pizza topping?

Besides your favorite, what is another pizza topping that you enjoy?
Do you prefer your favorite topping on a thin crust or thick crust pizza?
response_options: Thin Crust; Thick Crust; No Preference

question_text: Have you ever tried your favorite topping on a pizza with a white sauce instead of tomato sauce?
If you could create a pizza with unlimited toppings, what would be your top three choices (besides your favorite)?
How important is the quality of your favorite topping when choosing a pizza?
Would you ever try a pizza with a combination of sweet and savory toppings?
What is your least favorite pizza topping and why?
How willing are you to try new and unusual pizza toppings?
